name: Chilling Spray

spell.name: Chilling Spray
spell.failure: The creature takes full damage and takes a –5-foot status penalty to its Speeds for 2 rounds.
spell.critical_failure: The creature takes double damage and takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speeds for 2 rounds.

text: A cone of icy shards bursts from your spread hands and coats the targets in a layer of frost. You deal 2d4 cold damage to creatures in the area; they must each attempt a Reflex save.
